title: Slash SaaS Costs: Build Your Own AI CRM with Chinese Models! #shorts
summary: Organizations are shifting away from expensive SaaS platforms like CRMs to build proprietary AI-powered alternatives. Chinese AI models are presented as cost-effective alternatives for these system overhauls.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof covers a shift away from costly SaaS platforms such as CRMs toward proprietary, AI-powered replacements built in house. It frames Chinese AI models as a cost-effective option for these system overhauls. The takeaway: organizations can cut recurring SaaS spend by replacing licensed tools with custom systems running on lower-cost models.
